title: Skills Radar, Explainability, and Interaction - Structured Source
content:
Neural radar signals (top strengths):
- Production GenAI and RAG system design using LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, FAISS, and local model serving.
- MLOps and platform engineering across Docker/Kubernetes, CI/CD, model versioning, and drift-aware operations.
- Data/ML depth in NLP, computer vision, and distributed processing with measurable optimization outcomes.

Explainability and validation practices:
- Uses SHAP-based feature interpretation, cross-validation, hyperparameter tuning, and ablation studies before deployment decisions.
- Applies evaluation metrics and experimentation workflows (including A/B style thinking and quality benchmarking) to keep model claims evidence-backed.

Interaction and user-experience orientation:
- Builds full-stack AI experiences with clear API boundaries and operational telemetry for debugging and quality feedback.
- Emphasizes practical UX behavior: reliable outputs, visible system state, and iterative improvements informed by usage and monitoring signals.
